source_of_truth: docs/v8.1-provider-adapter-policy.md is the self-hosting adapter policy for v8.1.
permission_boundary: Read-only local policy evidence; no external provider call is authorized by this record.
freshness_boundary: Policy freshness is tied to the v8.1 release commit and must be reviewed before later adapter execution.
availability_boundary: Local repository file must resolve before release sign-off.
approval_boundary: Read does not require additional approval; write-capable provider adapters require Council or human approval.
side_effect_boundary: This resource has no external side effects.
not_proven: This resource record does not prove external provider output correctness, credential safety, billing safety, or operator acceptance.
